title: hieracium rohacsense subsp. cernaeglavae
intro: Hieracium rohacsense subsp. cernaeglavae, a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium rohacsense subsp. cernaeglavae are said to include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
